title: Run FediTest conformance suite against smallhold
description: FediTest (https://feditest.org, github.com/fediverse-devnet/feditest) is the most comprehensive AP conformance suite. NLnet-funded, actively maintained. Sets up a constellation of nodes and runs interop tests. Clone feditest-tests-fediverse repo, configure smallhold as a node, run the test suite, fix failures.
close_reason: FediTest: 17/18 WebFinger tests passed (1 failure: JRD content-type subtype check). System tests require 2 nodes.
